title: Robot girlfriends, recursive AI agents, full AI research, Happy Horse: AI NEWS
summary: A news roundup covering 20+ recent AI releases and announcements, including foundation models (Grok 4.3, Mistral 3.5, SenseNova U1), specialized models (Talkie, Ling 2.6 Flash), video/animation tools (OmniShotCut, Mocap Anything v2, Vista 4D, Z-anime), agent frameworks (recursive multi-agents, Moonlake), and robotics systems (Happy Horse, TFBOT Ella, Robotera factory). Hosted by AI Search YouTube channel with timestamps and direct links to documentation and product pages.
